title: Tutorial

welcome.title: Welcome to Haushaltsmanager!
welcome.description: This short tour shows you the key features. You can skip it at any time and restart it later.
welcome.h2: All data belongs to your demo household
welcome.h3: Feel free to try everything – nothing will break

tasks.title: Manage tasks
tasks.description: Create tasks for your household, assign them to members, and set due dates. Tasks can be one-time or recurring.
tasks.h3: Use projects to group related tasks

recurring.title: Recurring tasks
recurring.description: Create tasks that repeat automatically – daily, weekly, monthly, or on a custom rotation schedule. Irregular appointments can be planned manually.
recurring.h3: Rotation schedule: assign tasks in turns

calendar.title: Calendar & appointments
calendar.description: The calendar shows all upcoming tasks and appointments in a clear monthly or list view. Follow-up appointments, special dates, and loans are color-coded.
calendar.h2: Complete or skip appointments directly from the calendar
calendar.h3: Appointment notes for individual follow-up dates

shopping.title: Shopping list
shopping.description: Maintain a shared shopping list for your household. Items can be sorted by category, linked to tasks, and checked off while shopping.
shopping.h1: Shared list for all household members

inventory.title: Inventory & loans
inventory.description: Manage items in your household. You can record articles, set borrowing rules, and track loan processes – even across households.
inventory.h1: Inventory list with categories and photos
inventory.h3: Return dates visible in the calendar

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Group related tasks into projects. Projects help structure larger undertakings like renovations or moves clearly.
projects.h1: Assign tasks to one or more projects

members.title: Members & neighborhood
members.description: Invite more people to your household and manage roles. The neighborhood feature lets you connect with other households and share items.

history.title: History & statistics
history.description: The history shows all completed tasks and activities of your household. Keep track of who did what and when.

finish.title: Ready to go!
finish.description: You've seen all the main features. Explore the demo household at your leisure – all data is pre-filled so you can try everything right away.
finish.h1: Demo data is pre-filled for you to explore
finish.h2: Create an account to keep your household permanently
finish.h3: The tutorial can be restarted anytime via the demo banner

selfNavigate: → Click the highlighted menu item in the sidebar
